2605.17361.title: \textsc{MasFACT}: Continual Multi-Agent Topology Learning via Geometry-Aware Posterior Transfer
2605.17361.paper_summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) powered by large language models (LLMs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for complex problem solving, where performance critically depends on the underlying inter-agent communication topology. However, existing topology generation methods mainly optimize for isolated tasks, while real-world deployments involve streams of evolving tasks, requiring previously effective collaboration patterns to be retained and reused rather than rediscovered or overwritten. We identify a previously underexplored failure mode, \emph{topology forgetting}, in which adapting to new tasks shifts the topology generator away from communication structures required by earlier tasks. This issue stems from cross-task misalignment in both agent-level functional semantics and relational communication structures. To address this challenge, we propose \textbf{\textsc{MasFACT}}, a geometry-aware posterior transfer framework that preserves and reuses historical collaboration knowledge as transferable topology priors. We transfer these priors across task-specific agent spaces through Fused Gromov-Wasserstein optimal transport and perform PAC-Bayes-guided conservative posterior adaptation to balance task-specific plasticity with structural stability. Experiments across class-, domain-, and task-level continual settings demonstrate that \textsc{MasFACT} consistently improves average accuracy while reducing topology forgetting compared to strong topology generation and replay-based baselines, and can be seamlessly integrated with different MAS topology generators.
2605.17361.paper_summary_zh: 多代理系統（MAS）由大型語言模型（LLM）驅動，已成為解決複雜問題的強大範式，其性能在很大程度上依賴於基礎的代理間通信拓撲。<lb/>然而，現有的拓撲生成方法主要針對孤立任務進行優化，而現實世界的部署涉及不斷演變的任務流，要求保留和重用以前有效的協作模式，而不是重新發現或覆蓋。<lb/>我們識別出一種先前未被充分探索的失效模式，\emph{拓撲遺忘}，在這種情況下，適應新任務會使拓撲生成器偏離早期任務所需的通信結構。<lb/>這一問題源於代理層級功能語義和關係通信結構之間的跨任務不對齊。<lb/>為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了\textbf{\textsc{MasFACT}}，這是一個幾何感知的後驗轉移框架，能夠保留和重用歷史協作知識作為可轉移的拓撲先驗。<lb/>我們通過融合的Gromov-Wasserstein最優運輸在任務特定的代理空間中轉移這些先驗，並進行PAC-Bayes指導的保守後驗適應，以平衡任務特定的可塑性與結構穩定性。<lb/>在類別、領域和任務層級的持續設置中進行的實驗表明，\textsc{MasFACT}在提高平均準確率的同時，減少了拓撲遺忘，與強大的拓撲生成和基於重放的基準相比，表現出一致的改進，並且可以與不同的MAS拓撲生成器無縫集成。
2605.17361.author: Xuefei Wang et.al.
2605.17361.authors: Xuefei Wang, Jialu Wang, Fengbo Zhang, Yihan Hu, Di Zhang, Yutong Ye, Yikun Ban, Jun Han, Ruijie Wang
